markdownRemark.html:
Awesome D3

This list keeps track of interesting D3js libraries, plugins and utilities.
We decided not to list tutorials, resources or concepts here, because there is already a very good list of readings out there you can check out and contribute to.

Curators: Moritz Klack and Christopher Möller of webkid.io

You can also explore the list with our interactive D3 Discovery tool.

Charts

  • billboard.jsstars5.4k - Re-usable chart library [bar, line, area, donut, pie, step, spline]
  • britechartsstars3.7k - Client-side reusable charting library [bar, line, donut, sparkline, step]
  • chart-partsstars595 - A flexible, React-friendly, Grammar of Graphics for data visualization
  • cirrusjsstars94 - A multi-renderer charts library [area, line, stacked]
  • cubismstars4.9k - Time series visualization
  • c3stars9.2k - Reusable chart library [line, spline, step, area, stacked, bar, pie, donut]
  • dagre-d3stars2.7k - Layout directed graphs on the client-side
  • dc.jsstars7.4k - For heavy amounts of data
  • dimplestars2.7k - An object-oriented API for business analytics [bubble, area, stacked]
  • d2bstars94 - Chart library for axis, pie, sankey, sunburst charts
  • d3.chartstars735 - Framework for building reusable charts
  • d3.chart.sankeystars105 - Reusable D3 Sankey diagram
  • d3-barstars174 - Bar chart
  • d3-beeswarmstars50 - Plugin which computes a beeswarm arrangement
  • d3-boxplotstars21 - d3js box plot plugin
  • d3-bumps-chartstars14 - Plugin for visualizing bumps charts
  • d3-circlestars129 - Circle chart [donut]
  • d3-dagstars1.2k - Layout algorithms for visualizing directed acylic graphs
  • d3-dotstars129 - Dot chart
  • d3-ezstars49 - Easy Reusable D3 Charts & Components [bar, donut, pie, bubble, rose, heatmap]
  • d3-flame-graphstars719 - Flame graphs from hierarchical data
  • d3-funnelstars319 - A funnel and pyramid chart library
  • d3-griddingstars103 - Chart mockups using grids
  • d3-heatmapstars242 - Heatmap
  • d3-horizon-chartstars125 - Horizon charts module
  • d3-linestars125 - Line chart
  • d3-message-sequencestars92 - A dynamic/static message sequence chart
  • d3-timeseriesstars140 - Time series charting library
  • d3-upsetstars13 - Functions for plotting an UpSet plot [upset, bar, intersections, venn, relationships]
  • d3-x3dstars82 - Data Driven 3D Charts with D3 and X3D [bubble, bar, surfacearea, scatterplot, area]
  • d3fcstars1.1k - A collection of interactive chart components [line, bar, stacked, scatter, candlestick, ohlc]
  • d3plusstars1.6k - Extension library for easy creation of visualizations [scatter, stacked, line, bar, pie, network, bubble, box, map]
  • d3panelsstars28 - Interactive charts with linked brushing [dot, scatter, line, heatmap, histogram]
  • d3piestars371 - A configurable pie chart lib and generator
  • D3xterstars341 - Straight forward plotting [plot, timeline, bar, histogram, pie]
  • D4stars430 - Re-usable charts DSL [bar, donut, line, scatter, stacked, waterfall]
  • dTreestars407 - Family tree library
  • epochstars5k - A general purpose, real-time visualization library [area, bar, line, pie, scatter]
  • EventDropsstars1.2k - A time based/event series interactive visualization
  • Fancycharts.jsstars113 - Library to visualize percentage values [bar, circles, donut]
  • firespraystars105 - Streaming charts [bar, line, stacked]
  • forest-d3stars53 - A time series charting library [line, area, stacked, bar, scatter, pie ohlc]
  • Gantt-Chartstars389 - Gantt chart library
  • insightsstars198 - Library to visualize and navigate graphs
  • kotojsstars281 - ES6 based framework
  • metrics-graphicsstars7.5k - Optimized for visualizing time-series data [line, scatter, area]
  • micropolarstars125 - A polar chart library
  • mpld3stars2.2k - Export matplotlib graphics to work in the Browser
  • neo4jd3stars1.1k - Neo4j graph visualization
  • nvd3stars7.2k - Re-usable charts and chart components [box plot, buttlet, candlestick, line, bar, pie, scatter, sparkline]
  • oecd-simple-chartsstars20 - Simple charting library [box plot, stacked bar, pearl chart]
  • peekstars65 - Object-oriented chart library [scatter, line, area, bar, pie, donut]
  • plotly.jsstars15k - High level charting library [scatter, line, bar, pie, box plot, histogram, heatmap]
  • plottablestars2.9k - Flexible, interactive charts for the web [area, bar, line, pie, scatter, stacked]
  • radar-chart-d3stars418 - Radar chart module
  • rickshawstars6.5k - Toolkit for creating interactive real-time graphs [line, scatter, bar]
  • tauchartsstars1.9k - Charts with a focus on design and flexibility [line, bar, area, stacked]
  • techan.jsstars2.3k - A visual, stock charting and technical analysis [candlestick, ohlc]
  • uvCharts - Supports lots of different chart types [bar, area, pie, stacked, line, polar, donut]
  • vegastars10k - A visualization grammar
  • vega-litestars3.9k - A high-level grammar of interactive graphics
  • vega-lite-apistars181 - A JavaScript API for Vega-Lite.
  • venn.jsstars954 - Area proportional Venn and Euler diagrams
  • visavailstars279 - Time data availability visualization
  • vizabistars264 - A framework for building visual data exploration tools [bubble, map, line, bar, sankey, donut]
  • WebColastars1.8k - Layout for graph visualization and exploration
  • xkcdgraphsstars443 - Xkcd style graphs [line]
Third Party
  • angular-nvd3stars1.3k - NVd3 for AngularJS [line, stacked, bar, area, scatter, bullet, donut]
  • d3actstars302 - d3 with React [bar, bubble, pie]
  • d3-simpleChartsstars4 - A d3 wordpress plugin
  • ember-chartsstars793 - Charts for Ember [line, bar, stacked, pie, scatter]
  • Layer Cake - A graphics framework built on top of Svelte.
  • line-chartstars1.2k - Line chart module for AngularJS [line, area, bar]
  • nivostars10.5k - Dataviz components for React with isomorphic ability [bar, line, area, bubble, chord, heatmap]
  • ngx-chartsstars4.2k - Chart framework for Angular [bar, pie, line, area, polar, stacked, bubble]
  • potionstars183 - Collection of React components for composing visualizations
  • react-d3stars1.8k - Charts for React [area, bar, candlestick, line, pie, scatter]
  • react-d3-componentsstars1.6k - D3 Components [bar, stacked, scatter, line, area, pie]
  • react-d3-librarystars1.4k - Library to use D3 in React [area, bar, line, pie, scatter]
  • react-stockchartsstars3.5k - Highly customizable stock charts [area, line, scatter, bubble, bar, stacked, candlestick]
  • react-visstars8.4k - A collection of react components to render visualizations [area, bar, heatmap, line, scatter]
  • reavizstars700 - Data visualization library for React based on D3
  • rechartsstars19k - Re-designed charting library built with React
  • semioticstars5 - A data visualization framework combining React & D3 [scatter, line, area]
  • victorystars9.9k - Composable React components for building visualizations [area, bar, candlestick, pie, line, scatter, voronoi]
  • vxstars16k - Visualization components for React [bar, line, scatter, stacked, area, pattern, heatmap, pie, radial, map, geo]
  • Vsstars166 - Declarative visualisation components for Vue.js [bar, line, area, pie, donut, stacked, sankey, timeline]
  • v-chart-pluginstars198 - Easily bind a chart to the data stored in your Vue.js components.

Maps

  • d3-carto-mapstars272 - A mapping API that uses D3 geospatial functionality
  • d3-composite-projectionsstars93 - Projections for showing countries' distant lands together
  • datamapsstars3.7k - Customizable map visualizations in one file
  • d3-topogramstars315 - Continuous area cartograms based on TopoJSON
  • d3-exploderstars94 - Lets you easily move and resize geographic features
  • d3-geo-polygonstars93 - Clipping and geometric operations for spherical polygons
  • d3-geo-projectionstars984 - Extended geographic projections
  • d3-geo-scale-barstars39 - Displays automatic scale bars for projected geospatial data.
  • d3-geo-voronoistars199 - Voronoi diagrams and Delaunay triangulation for the sphere
  • d3-geomapstars124 - Library for creating geographic maps
  • d3.geo2rectstars190 - Morphing geojson polygons into rectangles
  • d3-inertiastars56 - An extension to d3-drag that continues the mouse movement with some inertia
  • earthjsstars150 - Building orthographic globe with SVG, Canvas & WebGL
  • mapmap.jsstars103 - A data-driven API for interactive thematic maps
  • mapsense.jsstars88 - Full resolution vector maps with D3
  • maptablestars57 - Convert datasets to a set of visual components (Map, Filters, Table)
  • simple-map-d3stars113 - Easy choropleth style maps
  • spamstars102 - Create maps with D3 and Canvas, easily
Third Party
  • leaflet-d3stars238 - Collection of plugins for using D3 with Leaflet [map, geo]
  • react-d3-basicstars217 - Library For Building Composable And Declarative Maps [map, geo]
  • Wikimaps-D3js Atlasstars42 - CLI to generate raster, topojson and svg maps [map, geo]
  • react-simple-mapsstars2.7k - An SVG mapping component library for React, built on top of d3-geo [map, geo]

Utils

  • crossfilterstars1.6k - Library for exploring large multivariate datasets
  • d3kit-timelinestars343 - Timeline component that labels do not overlap
  • d3scriptionstars29 - Tooltip with window edge collision detection
  • d3-annotationstars728 - Annotation helper with built-in annotation types
  • d3-area-labelstars60 - A library for placing labels in areas
  • d3-breadcrumbsstars4 - Simplifies breadcrumbs usage
  • d3-componentstars109 - Lightweight component abstraction
  • d3-extendedstars272 - Extends d3 with some common jQuery functions
  • d3-helpersstars25 - Little utility functions
  • d3-historystars49 - Proper URL bar history
  • d3-hsluvstars6 - Human-friendly HSL (Hue, Saturation, Lightness) color space.
  • d3-iconarraystars81 - A plug-in for aligning elements in grids
  • d3-interpolate-pathstars289 - Interpolates paths with different number of points
  • d3-jetpackstars599 - Nifty convenience wrappers that speed up your daily work
  • d3-Labelerstars211 - Plug-in for automatic label placement
  • d3-lassostars81 - Tag elements by drawing a line over or around objects
  • d3-legendstars726 - Legend helper
  • d3-loomstars91 - Plugin to create a "loom" visualization
  • d3-nelson-rulesstars16 - Apply nelsons rules of process control to a set of data
  • d3-peaksstars53 - Find peaks in a noisy signal
  • d3-ring-notestars109 - Plugin for placing circle and text annotations
  • d3-scale-clusterstars126 - Scale that clusters data into discrete groups
  • d3-sparqlstars106 - Utility for accessing data from SPARQL Endpoints
  • d3-sliderstars248 - jQuery UI inspired slider
  • d3-starterkitstars127 - Helper functions simplifying common and verbose d3 patterns
  • d3-templatestars8 - Plugin to create and render templates using D3's data binding mechanism
  • d3-tipstars1.2k - Tooltip helper
  • d3-tipystars94 - Tooltip helper
  • d3-tooltipstars11 - Arrow shaped tooltip with shadows and dynamic content
  • d3-trailstars139 - A layout for creating better path elements
  • d3-voronoi-treemapstars155 - Computes a treemap based on a Voronoi tesselation
  • d3-xraystars26 - Bookmarklet that logs results of the data joins as you mouse over
  • d3.svg.circularbrushstars61 - A brush for selecting cyclical data
  • d3.svg.ribbonstars22 - An area interpolator
  • d3kitstars420 - A set of tools to speed D3 related project development
  • iopctrlstars37 - Lib for making simple user interface controls
  • kodamastars55 - Tooltip Plugin
  • swoopyarrowsstars102 - Plugin to create swoopy arrows
  • swoopy-dragstars119 - Artisanal label placement for d3 graphics
  • texturesstars6k - SVG patterns for data visualization

Miscellaneous

  • chess-datavizstars66 - Chess dataviz library
  • codeflowerstars651 - Bird's eye view of the whole code
  • comic.jsstars153 - Cartoon style drawing. Works also for canvas, Raphael & SVG.js
  • dragitstars188 - A toolkit to enable the manipulation of data graphics
  • d3mojistars126 - First class emoji support
  • d3-cloudstars3.6k - Word clouds
  • d3-context-menustars133 - Helper to create context-menus
  • d3-force-gravitystars21 - Implement gravitational attraction (or force-field-like repulsion)
  • d3-force-reusestars107 - Faster force-directed graph layouts by reusing force approximations
  • d3-force-sampledstars44 - Super fast, linear-time force-directed graph layouts by Random Vertex Sampling
  • d3-resumestars40 - Resume visualizer
  • d3.sketchystars241 - Creates sketchy backgrounds, shapes and lines
  • d3plus-textstars96 - Smart SVG text box with line wrapping and automatic font scaling
  • graph-scrollstars505 - Simple scrolling events
  • jsdoc2diagramstars40 - Create tree diagram from jsdoc
  • mermaidstars50.5k - Generation of diagrams and flowcharts from text in a markdown style
  • netvisstars16 - Visualize network communication for arbitrary protocols
  • treevizstars133 - Create customizable trees from json data
  • twitter-sentiment-visualisationstars162 - A series of D3.js charts showing realtime sentiment of Twitter data

Server side

  • d3-nodestars661 - Static chart and map generation
  • Kyrixstars133 - Interactive pan/zoom Visualizations with automatic server-side scaling support.

Code Editors

  • d3-snippetsstars36 - Snippets for Atom
  • d3-snippets-for-sublime-text-2stars13 - Snippets for Sublime
  • d3Snippetsstars3 - Snippets for VS Code
